project_type: Next.js 15 App Router marketplace (classified ads platform)
test_framework: No test framework currently set up - project has no tests
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build to verify TypeScript compiles and pages render without errors. Run pnpm lint to verify no linting issues.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. Node.js v22, pnpm available. No Supabase env vars configured - app must work gracefully without them.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Key rule: NO fake data, all links must work, all buttons must be functional, no 3D libraries.
key_patterns: Uses @/* path alias for src/. Shadcn UI components in src/components/ui/. Feature-based architecture in src/features/. Framer Motion for animations. Zustand for state. Dark theme with gold accent (#C6A769). Colors defined in src/config/colors.ts and CSS variables in globals.css. Supabase graceful fallback pattern already exists in middleware (isSupabaseConfigured check).
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages. src/components/ui/ - Shadcn UI primitives. src/components/layout/ - Header, Footer, MobileNav. src/components/sections/ - Homepage sections. src/components/animations/ - Framer Motion wrappers. src/features/ - Feature modules (auth, marketplace, dashboard, admin, seller, checkout). src/lib/ - Utilities (supabase, security). src/stores/ - Zustand stores. src/config/ - Site config, colors. src/types/ - TypeScript types. src/hooks/ - Custom React hooks.
